outfit_info.outfit_description: A sleek black turtleneck is layered under a silver ruffled satin top, creating a dramatic contrast. Paired with minimalist sneakers and a vibrant red bucket bag, the look is accessorized with cat-eye sunglasses and a dark baseball cap, embodying an active, fashion-forward urban aesthetic.

model_attributes.body: The model has a lean, athletic physique, conveying strength and grace.
model_attributes.pose: She is captured mid-air, leaping dynamically with arms extended, suggesting agility and movement.
model_attributes.background: A fantastical, steampunk-inspired cityscape at dusk, under an eclipse, creating a dramatic, ethereal setting.
